<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List invoices for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/partners/invoices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves all invoices for a given organization.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organizationId","required":true,"in":"query","description":"External organization ID","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"limit","required":false,"in":"query","description":"Maximum number of invoices to return","schema":{"type":"number"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"List of invoices"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - Organization does not belong to the partner"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
